bead_descriptions.MOC: atoms C1, O3 - methyl carbon C1 with hydrogens H1, H2, H3 and carbonyl oxygen O3
bead_descriptions.CNI: atoms C2, N4 - carbonyl carbon C2 and amide nitrogen N4
bead_descriptions.CGD2: atoms C5, C6 - methyl carbon C5 with hydrogens H4, H5, H6 and methyl carbon C6 with hydrogens H7, H8, H9
bead_descriptions.DUP: positive dummy bead for dipole representation attached to electropositive CNI bead
bead_descriptions.DUN: negative dummy bead for dipole representation attached to electronegative MOC bead
